display.purpose: Hero title and top-of-section H2s. Hand-drawn Comico.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy. Zodiak serif, measure 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase section eyebrows and meta, 0.12em tracking.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover, with 4px translateY and a teal border.

motion.name: lift
motion.purpose: 1px hover lift on buttons, 4px on cards.

motion.name: scroll-choreography
motion.purpose: Hero device swap and pinned process panels. Slow, short amplitude.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single confident CTA. Petróleo pill, hand-drawn label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.5rem; background:var(--teal,#1A6870); color:#fff; font-family:'Comico',cursive; font-weight:600; font-size:.9rem; letter-spacing:.03em; padding:.85rem 1.75rem; border:none; border-radius:999px; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s ease, transform .15s ease, box-shadow .2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:var(--teal-metal,#2F6B73); transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(26,104,112,0.35); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Hairline border, recolors to petróleo on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.5rem; background:transparent; color:var(--text-light,#F4F1EA); font-family:'Comico',cursive; font-weight:600; font-size:.9rem; letter-spacing:.03em; padding:.85rem 1.75rem; border:1px solid rgba(244,241,234,0.25); border-radius:999px; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; transition:color .2s ease, border-color .2s ease, transform .15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color:var(--teal-hover,#4F98A3); border-color:var(--teal-hover,#4F98A3); transform:translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Section Eyebrow
components.description: Uppercase petróleo-light label above every section heading.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display:block; font-family:'Zodiak',serif; font-size:.72rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--teal-hover,#4F98A3); margin:0 0 1rem; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat charcoal-elevated surface; lifts with a teal border on hover.
components.html:
Greenbond

Plataforma de gestão e tokenização de ativos.
components.css: .ds-card { background:var(--bg-dark-hi,#191B1F); color:var(--text-light,#F4F1EA); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border-radius:12px; padding:1.5rem; transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease; } .ds-card h3 { font-family:'Comico',cursive; font-weight:400; margin:0 0 .4rem; } .ds-card p { font-family:'Zodiak',serif; color:#828990; margin:0; line-height:1.6; } .ds-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); border-color:var(--teal,#1A6870); box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Recessed dark well; focus deepens the fill and turns the border petróleo.
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; padding:.65rem .85rem; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius:8px; color:var(--text-light,#F4F1EA); font-family:'Zodiak',serif; font-size:1rem; transition:border-color .2s ease, background .2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#828990; } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--teal,#1A6870); background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--teal-hover,#4F98A3); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Capability Tag
components.description: Small teal-tinted pill listing a service capability.
components.css: .ds-tag { display:inline-block; font-family:'Zodiak',serif; font-size:.7rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--teal-hover,#4F98A3); background:rgba(26,104,112,0.12); padding:.35rem .7rem; border-radius:999px; }

narrative.overview: Barata Studio is a one-person web atelier that sells the opposite of a template. The site feels like the workshop of someone who cuts every joint by hand: dark, warm, unhurried, quiet. Petróleo is rationed to almost nothing, motion is slow and short, and the loudest thing on the page is a hand-drawn wordmark that literally looks made à mão. It runs on warm-tinted darks with a few warm off-white breathing rooms; depth comes from tonal layering and slow scroll choreography, not decoration. Design is the product, so craft is the argument.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-tinted darkness: charcoal and off-white, never #000 or #fff.
Petróleo as a rare guest: teal on ~5% of any screen.
Hand-drawn headings (Comico) against a serif body (Zodiak).
Slow, short, few-things-at-once motion. Depth over spectacle.
Editorial lists and negative space instead of icon-card grids.

rules.name: The 5% Rule
rules.body: Petróleo touches at most ~5% of any screen: eyebrows, hover, focus, a single primary button, a progress line. Its rarity is the luxury.

rules.name: The No-Pure Rule
rules.body: Never #000, never #fff. Every neutral is tinted warm.

rules.name: The Surface-Aware Muted Rule
rules.body: Secondary text uses text-muted (#828990) on dark and text-muted-on-light (#5B6065) on warm. One grey never serves both surfaces.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Comico for anything titular or interactive; Zodiak for anything read in sentences. Never a third family.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat until touched. Shadows appear only on hover or on the hero devices.

dos: Do keep petróleo under ~5% of any screen.
Do tint every neutral warm; backgrounds charcoal or warm paper, text bone or ink.
Do set headings and buttons in Comico, body in Zodiak.
Do use text-muted on dark and text-muted-on-light on warm so secondary text clears 4.5:1.
Do build depth by stacking charcoal tones; shadows only on hover and hero devices.
Do favor editorial lists and negative space over icon-in-a-circle card grids.
Do keep motion slow, short in amplitude, one-thing-at-a-time.
donts: Don't let the site read as a SaaS template or startup-AI marketing page.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism or heavy blur.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't ship the hero-metric template as filler.
Don't overshoot, bounce, or fly objects around.
Don't introduce a third typeface or use Comico for body copy.
